languages.text: {n}Эоганн кладет руку ему на грудь.{/n} "Тихо, старый друг. Я вернулся прервать твои муки. Ты умрешь от моей руки, а не от ксеносской скверны. Свидетелем тому будет {name}, что воссоединил{mf||а} нас".
{n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн кладет руку ему на грудь.{/n} "Тихо, старый друг. Я вернулся прервать твои муки. Ты умрешь от моей руки, а не от ксеносской скверны. Свидетелем тому будет {name}, что воссоединил{mf||а} нас".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."
{n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."
{n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn pone la mano sobre el pecho de Nuncius.{/n} «Calla, viejo amigo. He vuelto para poner fin a tu tormento. Yo mismo te daré muerte, y no esa escoria xenos. {name} está aquí, con nosotros, para dar testimonio».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn pone la mano sobre el pecho de Nuncius.{/n} «Calla, viejo amigo. He vuelto para poner fin a tu tormento. Yo mismo te daré muerte, y no esa escoria xenos. {name} está aquí, con nosotros, para dar testimonio».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡将一只手放在努恩修斯的胸口。{/n}“安静，老朋友。我回来结束你的痛苦了。你会死在我手上，而不是被异形的污秽吞噬。在此见证的是{name}，是{mf|他|她}让我们重聚。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡将一只手放在努恩修斯的胸口。{/n}“安静，老朋友。我回来结束你的痛苦了。你会死在我手上，而不是被异形的污秽吞噬。在此见证的是{name}，是{mf|他|她}让我们重聚。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn pose une main sur la poitrine de Nuncius.{/n} « N'essaie pas de parler, mon vieil ami. Je suis revenu pour mettre fin à ton supplice. C'est de ma main que tu mourras, pas à cause de cette abomination xénos. {name} ici {mf|présent|présente}, {mf|celui|celle} qui nous a réunis, en sera témoin. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn pose une main sur la poitrine de Nuncius.{/n} « N'essaie pas de parler, mon vieil ami. Je suis revenu pour mettre fin à ton supplice. C'est de ma main que tu mourras, pas à cause de cette abomination xénos. {name} ici {mf|présent|présente}, {mf|celui|celle} qui nous a réunis, en sera témoin. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn,elini Nuncius'un göğsüne koyuyor.{/n} "Sus eski dostum. Istırabını sonlandırmaya geldim. Seni öldüren zeno illeti değil, ben olacağım. Bizi yeniden bir araya getiren Hür Tacir de yanımızda, buna şahit olacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn,elini Nuncius'un göğsüne koyuyor.{/n} "Sus eski dostum. Istırabını sonlandırmaya geldim. Seni öldüren zeno illeti değil, ben olacağım. Bizi yeniden bir araya getiren Hür Tacir de yanımızda, buna şahit olacak."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn legt eine Hand auf Nuncius' Brust.{/n} "Schweigt, alter Freund. Ich bin zurückgekehrt, um Euer Leid zu beenden. Ihr werdet durch meine Hand sterben, nicht durch diesen Xenos-Abschaum. {name} hier wird alles bezeugen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn legt eine Hand auf Nuncius' Brust.{/n} "Schweigt, alter Freund. Ich bin zurückgekehrt, um Euer Leid zu beenden. Ihr werdet durch meine Hand sterben, nicht durch diesen Xenos-Abschaum. {name} hier wird alles bezeugen."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスの胸に手を置く。{/n}「静かに、古き友よ。私はあなたの苦しみを終わらせるために戻ってきました。あなたは異種族の汚れによってではなく、この私の手によって死ぬのです。それを見届けるのは、我々を再び引き合わせてくれた{name}です」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn places a hand on Nuncius's chest.{/n} "Hush, old friend. I have returned to end your agony. You will die by my hand, not of the xenos' filth. Here to witness is {name}, who reunited us."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスの胸に手を置く。{/n}「静かに、古き友よ。私はあなたの苦しみを終わらせるために戻ってきました。あなたは異種族の汚れによってではなく、この私の手によって死ぬのです。それを見届けるのは、我々を再び引き合わせてくれた{name}です」
